findings.name: ai_chat_501_handling
findings.details: gateway/routes/ai.js:54-56 returns 501 NOT_CONFIGURED when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and OPENAI_API_KEY are both unset

findings.name: ai_chat_ensureConfigured
findings.details: gateway/config/env.js:33-36 implements ensureConfigured() checking both claude and gpt providers

findings.name: error_utility_501
findings.details: gateway/lib/errors.js:15 defines notConfigured() helper returning HttpError(501, 'NOT_CONFIGURED')

findings.name: tts_key_check
findings.details: gateway/routes/tts.js uses ELEVENLABS_API_KEY but does not return 501 when missing - returns 500 on API failure instead

findings.name: ui_offline_banner
findings.details: Frontend has degraded/offline status in PanelShell and various panels, but no runtime verification performed without API keys
